HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_POWER.description:
·每个目标至多拥有一个印记
·给予印记会使原有印记[gold]刻印[/gold]
·满足条件时，给予的印记会与原有印记[gold]叠色[/gold]成新印记并使用其叠色效果，叠色规则:
·紫=红+蓝 ·橙=红+黄
·白=黄+蓝 ·虹=红+黄+蓝
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_POWER.title: 印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_RED_POWER.description:
被动:每回合受到[blue]6[/blue]点伤害
刻印:下一次受到的攻击伤害变为[blue]2[/blue]倍
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_RED_POWER.smartDescri:
被动:每回合受到[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点伤害
刻印:下一次受到的攻击伤害变为[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]倍
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_RED_POWER.title: 火焰印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_YELLOW_POWER.descript:
被动:每回合产生[blue]3[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
刻印:给予[blue]1[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]，产生[blue]5[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_YELLOW_POWER.smartDes:
被动:每回合产生[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
刻印:给予[blue]1[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]，产生[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_YELLOW_POWER.title: 闪电印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_BLUE_POWER.descriptio:
被动:失去[blue]1[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
刻印:本回合失去[blue]3[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_BLUE_POWER.smartDescr:
被动:失去[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
刻印:本回合失去[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_BLUE_POWER.title: 冰霜印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_ORANGE_POWER.descript:
由[red]火焰[/red]+[color=#e7ea31]闪电[/color]叠色而成
被动:每回合产生[blue]6[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
刻印:下一次受到的攻击伤害会对其他目标造成等量伤害
叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点[orange]黄昏绘色[/orange]，产生[blue]8[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_ORANGE_POWER.smartDes:
由[red]火焰[/red]+[color=#e7ea31]闪电[/color]叠色而成
被动:每回合产生[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
刻印:下一次受到的攻击伤害会对其他目标造成等量伤害
叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点[orange]黄昏绘色[/orange]，产生[blue]{Fusion}[/blue]点[gold]连锁[/gold]伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_ORANGE_POWER.title: 黄昏印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_PURPLE_POWER.descript:
由[red]火焰[/red]+[color=#31b0eb]冰霜[/color]叠色而成
被动:失去[blue]2[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
刻印:本回合失去[blue]6[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点[purple]紫幽绘色[/purple]，给予[blue]6[/blue]层[gold]消亡[/gold]
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_PURPLE_POWER.smartDes:
由[red]火焰[/red]+[color=#31b0eb]冰霜[/color]叠色而成
被动:失去[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
刻印:本回合失去[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点[purple]紫幽绘色[/purple]，给予[blue]{Fusion}[/blue]层[gold]消亡[/gold]
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_PURPLE_POWER.title: 紫幽印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_WHITE_POWER.descripti:
由[color=#31b0eb]冰霜[/color]+[color=#e7ea31]闪电[/color]叠色而成
被动:每回合收集[blue]1[/blue]点随机[gold]绘色[/gold]
刻印:抽[blue]2[/blue]张牌
叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点[color=#e8fcfb]光辉绘色[/color]，获得[blue]6[/blue]点格挡
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_WHITE_POWER.smartDesc:
由[color=#31b0eb]冰霜[/color]+[color=#e7ea31]闪电[/color]叠色而成
被动:每回合收集[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点随机[gold]绘色[/gold]
刻印:抽[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]张牌
叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点[color=#e8fcfb]光辉绘色[/color]，获得[blue]{Fusion}[/blue]点格挡
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_WHITE_POWER.title: 光辉印记
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_RAINBOW_POWER.descrip: 叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点所有[gold]绘色[/gold]，获得[blue]1[/blue]点{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_RAINBOW_POWER.smartDe: 叠色:收集[blue]1[/blue]点所有[gold]绘色[/gold]，获得[blue]{Fusion}[/blue]点{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}
HATMAGICIAN2-BRAND_RAINBOW_POWER.title: 虹色印记
HATMAGICIAN2-TMP_STRENGTH_POWER.descript: 冰霜会降低攻击造成的伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-TMP_STRENGTH_POWER.smartDes: 减少攻击造成的伤害值[blue]{Amount}[/blue]点
HATMAGICIAN2-TMP_STRENGTH_POWER.title: 冰霜
HATMAGICIAN2-MULTI_DAMAGE_POWER.descript: 下一次受到的攻击伤害变为[blue]2[/blue]倍
HATMAGICIAN2-MULTI_DAMAGE_POWER.smartDes: 下一次受到的攻击伤害变为[blue]{Amount}[/blue]倍
HATMAGICIAN2-MULTI_DAMAGE_POWER.title: 灼痕
HATMAGICIAN2-CHAIN_DAMAGE_POWER.descript: 下[blue]1[/blue]次受到的攻击伤害对其他所有目标造成等量伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-CHAIN_DAMAGE_POWER.smartDes: 下[blue]{Amount}[/blue]次受到的攻击伤害对其他所有目标造成等量伤害
HATMAGICIAN2-CHAIN_DAMAGE_POWER.title: 连锁
